name: Forlorn

rules.text: If you roll a success on a saving throw against an emotion effect, you get a critical success instead.
rules.title: {item|name}

description: Watching your friends age and die fills you with moroseness that protects you against harmful emotions. You gain a +1 circumstance bonus to saving throws against emotion effects. If you roll a success on a saving throw against an emotion effect, you get a critical success instead.
